description: The Engineering Manager needs a real-time view of the team's bug workload to identify bottlenecks. Create a Shared Query named 'Open Bugs Snapshot' that filters for all Bugs that are not Closed or Removed (New, Active, Committed). Add a Pie Chart widget to the 'TailwindTraders Team' dashboard using this query, configured to Group By 'Assigned To' so the manager can see who is overloaded.
